news.headline: FIU named Preeminent State Research University, youngest institution in elite group per Florida Board of Governors.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Miami, FIU was named a Preeminent State Research University by the Florida Board of Governors. This recognition is a testament to FIU's academic excellence and research achievements. At a young age, FIU has become the newest member of this prestigious group of universities. The designation, established in 2013 under Florida law, highlights FIU's commitment to advancing in the field of research and education.

news.headline: Cushing Terrell acquires Eclipse Engineering, enhancing structural engineering services for clients.
news.summary: The merger between Cushing Terrell and Eclipse Engineering enhances the services provided by the firms, offering clients more comprehensive structural engineering solutions. This collaboration took place in Billings, Montana on July 1, 2024. The joining of these two companies brings together a wider range of expertise and resources, strengthening their ability to meet the needs of various projects. This partnership signifies a significant development in the industry and paves the way for a more robust structural engineering landscape.

news.headline: Sherrie Westin named CEO of Sesame Workshop, first woman in the role since co-founder Joan Ganz Cooney.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on July 1, 2024, Sherrie Westin was appointed as the Chief Executive Officer of Sesame Workshop by the organization's Board of Trustees in New York. This decision marks a historic moment as Westin becomes the first woman to hold this position since Joan Ganz Cooney, one of the organization's co-founders. With this appointment, Westin will now spearhead the operations of the global impact nonprofit responsible for the iconic children's show Sesame Street. Prior to this role, Westin held the position of...

news.headline: US Treasury Department holds 3-month bill auction, raising $30 billion.
US auction of 6-month bills.
US 6-month bill high yield comes in at 5.115%, lower than the previous forecast of 5.140%.
US 3-month bill bid-to-cover drops to 2.76, missing forecast of 2.85.
US 6-month bill sees bid-to-cover at 2.99, below the previous 3.160 and forecasted figures.
US 3-month bill high yield at 5.24% (Previous 5.235%) and forecast unchanged.
Paul Seymour and Nicole Parker bring $113 million in assets under advisory to Cetera Advisor Networks from Cadaret, Grant & Co.
news.summary: Paul Seymour and Nicole Parker, operating under the name Financial Services, have recently transitioned from Cadaret, Grant & Co., Inc. to join Cetera Financial Group in San Diego on July 1, 2024. Cetera Financial Group, known as a top financial advisor Wealth Hub, reported the addition of Seymour and Parker to their team. This move signifies a notable change in the financial services sector, reflecting the growing influence and appeal of Cetera.

news.headline: Collagen Casings Market projected to reach $2.31 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research® report.
news.summary: In Redding, California on July 1, 2024, a recent market research report was released regarding the Collagen Casings Market. The report covers information on market size, share, forecasts, and trends analysis based on different factors such as type (Edible, Non-Edible), caliber (Small, Large), application (Fresh Sausages, Processed Sausages), and end user (Food Service). This report provides valuable insights for businesses in the industry to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas creates T SPARE inflatable support for tires to aid motorists during flat tires.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Austin, Texas shared his motivation behind creating the T SPARE as a safe solution for motorists dealing with flat tires. This innovative design offers a way for drivers to keep moving without the hassle of changing a tire or waiting for emergency assistance. The inventor's creation aims to address this common issue and provide a practical alternative. The T SPARE is set to revolutionize how drivers handle flat tires on the road.

news.headline: Shipley Do-Nuts introduces limited-time Egg & Cheese kolaches in the breakfast wars, available until Sept. 30.
news.summary: Houston's Shipley Do-Nuts, well-known for its classic pastries, is now introducing a special addition to its menu for a limited time. The new Egg & Cheese kolaches have joined the breakfast lineup, in response to the competitive landscape dubbed "the breakfast wars." This Texas-born brand has set the availability of these kolaches from July 1 to September 30, marking a temporary but enticing offer for customers. Enjoy these savory treats at any Shipley location for a limited period, adding some variety to your breakfast routine.

news.headline: WIN Technology acquires Digicorp Inc., expanding IT services; July 1, 2024; EAU CLAIRE, Wisconsin.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Eau Claire, Wisconsin, WIN Technology finalized its acquisition of Digicorp, Inc., marking a significant expansion of its leading IT Services operation. This strategic move aims to enhance the delivery of innovative digital solutions by leveraging the combined expertise of both companies. This acquisition highlights WIN Technology's commitment to growth and competitiveness in the market.

news.headline: Sold-out 68th Summer Fancy Food Show in New York City drew over 29,000 industry pros for June 23-25 event.
news.summary: In New York on July 1, 2024, over 29,000 individuals from the specialty food and beverage sector convened at the 68th Summer Fancy Food Show organized by the Specialty Food Association (SFA). The event, held from June 23 to 25 at the Jacob Javits Center in New York City, was completely sold out. These shows serve as a gathering place for professionals within the industry to network, showcase products, and engage in discussions surrounding the latest trends and innovations in the sector.

news.headline: Pinwheel and Narmi team up for frictionless direct deposit switching for financial institutions using Narmi, introducing Pinwheel Prime.
news.summary: Fintechs and financial institutions utilizing Narmi's platform have the opportunity to streamline the integration of seamless direct deposit switching into their account opening process through Pinwheel Prime. This new feature, launched in New York on July 1, 2024, aims to enhance the efficiency and user experience for customers. Pinwheel, a leading fintech company, is empowering financial institutions to prioritize customer satisfaction and improve their services.

news.headline: 40 high schools receive $5,000 grants to develop culinary programs with curriculum, supplies, and equipment.
news.summary: The Rachael Ray Foundation and the National... have announced that ProStart educators in 40 high schools nationwide will be awarded grants totaling $200,000. Each educator will receive a $5,000 grant to bolster their classroom experience through the acquisition of curriculum materials, supplies, and equipment. The grants aim to enhance the educational environment for both teachers and students, fostering greater learning opportunities and innovation in culinary education. The grants signify a significant investment in advancing the quality of education in high school culinary programs across the country.

news.headline: Vaisala Corporation announces share repurchase on 1.7.2024 to enhance climate action, with over 2,300 experts globally.
news.summary: Vaisala, a renowned company in measurement instruments and climate intelligence, plays a crucial role in promoting climate action worldwide. For nearly 90 years, they have been at the forefront of innovation with a dedicated team of over 2,300 experts. Their goal is to provide customers with the tools and data needed to enhance resource efficiency, facilitate energy transition, and prioritize the safety and well-being of global communities. Vaisala's series A shares are publicly listed on the Nasdaq Helsinki stock exchange, underlining their commitment to making a positive impact on the planet. Visit vaisala.com for more information.

news.headline: Technip Energies conducted share buybacks from June 24 to June 28, 2024, in compliance with regulations.
news.summary: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has announced its recent share buyback activities in compliance with regulations. From June 24 to June 28, 2024, the company acquired a certain number of its own shares.

news.headline: BioPorto gets US standing order, proving NGAL product's market acceptance.
Saudi Energy Minister reports discovery of several oil and gas fields, as per State News Agency.
Poker player beats cancer, lands $10,000 sponsorship from Once Upon a Coconut for WSOP 2024.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on July 1, 2024, a premium coconut water beverage company called Once Upon a Coconut revealed its sponsorship of professional poker player Terri Meglino for the 2024 World Series of Poker (WSOP) in Las Vegas, Nevada. This sponsorship marks an exciting collaboration, showcasing the company's support for Meglino in this prestigious poker event.

news.headline: Highline Warren to open new distribution center in Vacaville, CA, offering competitive benefits, hiring soon.
news.summary: A company based in Vacaville, California, Highline Warren, is set to launch a new distribution center in the area later in 2024. This move is part of the company's expansion plans and will bring a significant number of job opportunities to the region. The company is placing a strong emphasis on safety and is known for its competitive benefits package. They are actively seeking to fill various positions to staff the new distribution center, with hiring expected to ramp up in the coming months. This development is likely to have a positive impact on the local job market and economy in Vacaville.

news.headline: New campaign by National Association for Healthcare Quality highlights importance of improving care, reducing costs, and addressing workforce shortage in healthcare.
news.summary: The National Association for Healthcare Quality has launched a new campaign in Chicago on July 1, 2024. This campaign aims to raise awareness about the importance of quality in healthcare, highlighting the challenges in improving care, cutting costs, and dealing with an imminent workforce shortage. These issues are pressing, with a growing need to address them effectively.

news.headline: WHP Global partners with FFI Global to expand G-STAR Kids Line, boosting children's apparel market potential.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, WHP Global, a prominent brand management company, revealed a significant development by entering into a lengthy licensing deal with FFI Global. The agreement aims to enhance the G-STAR brand presence in the children's apparel sector. Through this partnership, FFI Global's industry know-how and broad market reach will be utilized to expand the brand's offerings.

news.headline: Global surfboard market will grow by $4.80 billion from 2024-2028, driven by increasing popularity of educational surfing courses.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the worldwide surfboard market is projected to expand by approximately USD 4.80 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per findings by Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is anticipated to increase at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.2%. Various factors are contributing to this growth, including...

news.headline: Global eNVM market report predicts $724.68 million revenue by 2029 dominated by major players like eMemory & Microchip.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Global Embedded Non-Volatile Memory (eNVM) Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report analyzes different types of eNVM such as eFLASH, eE2PROM, FRAM, and others, as well as various applications like consumer electronics, automotive, healthcare monitoring, enterprise storage, and other applications. The global eNVM market was valued at US$401.86 million in 2023 and is projected to reach US$724.68 million by 2029. It is anticipated that the market will continue to grow significantly in the coming years.

news.headline: Europe version of Bloomberg Close race coverage.
Alcanza Clinical Research appoints Casey Orvin as Chief Commercial Officer, industry thought leader.
news.summary: Casey Orvin has been appointed as the Chief Commercial Officer for Alcanza Clinical Research, a mission-driven investigator site network based in Orlando, Florida. The announcement was made on July 1, 2024. With years of experience in operational and commercial leadership roles, Casey Orvin is a well-respected industry thought leader. Alcanza Clinical Research aims to benefit from his expertise in driving commercial success.

news.headline: Karl Lowe appointed to Service Coordination, Inc. Board of Directors, effective July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Located in Frederick, Maryland, Service Coordination, Inc. (SCI) has recently welcomed Karl Lowe to its Board of Directors, as of July 1, 2024. With a strong background in utilizing technology to enhance quality of life, Karl's appointment brings extensive expertise to the team. This addition further strengthens SCI's mission to drive positive impact and innovation in the community.

news.headline: National Liquidators to auction 130-foot Westport luxury superyacht on Aug 7 in Fort Lauderdale, below market value.
news.summary: A unique chance is available to acquire a prestigious superyacht at a reduced price in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., as of July 1, 2024. National Liquidators, renowned as the leading marine liquidation company globally, will be overseeing the live auction of Summer of 69, a 130-foot luxury vessel. This presents an exceptional opportunity for prospective buyers to secure this esteemed superyacht below the current market value.

news.headline: Tri Delta raises $100 million for St. Jude with grassroots fundraising efforts like pancake sales, walks/runs, and letter campaigns.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee, St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital revealed at their annual joint celebration on June 28, 2024, that Tri Delta has successfully amassed a record-breaking $100 million over their 25-year partnership. Beginning in 1999, Tri Delta members, both current students and alumnae, have diligently raised this remarkable sum through various grassroots fundraising activities. These initiatives encompassed unique events like pancake sales known as Delta House of Pancakes (DHOP), organizing campus sports events, conducting the impactful Sincerely Yours letter-writing campaign, as well as participating in walk/run events.

news.headline: Mixed reactions from traders as Bitcoin's price rebounds. DonAlt sees a bearish retest as two major retests may occur in Q3.
news.summary: The recent rebound in Bitcoin's price stirred up differing opinions among traders and technical analysts regarding the near future of the leading cryptocurrency. Well-known crypto trader DonAlt remarked on Bitcoin’s attempt to close above support, expressing uncertainty as it fell just short. He viewed the weekly close as a negative bearish retest. Another trader drew parallels between the current Bitcoin situation and the third quarter of 2023, emphasizing two significant retests of crucial support levels following an extended period of consolidation. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Company director increases personal shareholding by acquiring 5000 additional shares.
Sanofi plans $1.4 billion-$1.6 billion upgrade for Frankfurt insulin plant, keeping Lantus production in Germany.
news.summary: Sanofi, a French pharmaceutical company, is set to invest approximately 1.3 billion to 1.5 billion euros (equivalent to $1.4 billion to $1.6 billion) in enhancing its insulin production facility located in Frankfurt, Germany. This site, situated in Frankfurt's Hoechst district, specifically manufactures Sanofi's insulin brand, Lantus. Previously, there were intentions to relocate the production of Lantus to France, but this decision was revisited. The restructuring marks a significant commitment by Sanofi to improve its operations in Germany. In related news, a recent ruling by a Hawaii court has held Bristol Myers and Sanofi accountable in a blood clot drug case, increasing their liability to $916 million. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: North Island Credit Union partners with Boys & Girls Clubs SD for backpack drive, accepting new backpack donations for students.
news.summary: Local credit union branches in San Diego are currently accepting donations of new backpacks for elementary and middle school students. The initiative, led by North Island Credit Union, aims to support students in need. The school backpack drive is in partnership with the Boys & Girls Club. The drive started on July 1, 2024, and aims to provide backpacks for a substantial number of local students. This initiative not only helps students with essential supplies but also fosters community support and involvement in education.

news.headline: Energy harvesting systems market to reach $1.0 billion by 2031, per Meticulous Research report.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, it was reported in Redding, California that a recent study revealed key insights on the Energy Harvesting Systems Market. This market research report delved into various aspects including components, energy sources such as solar and thermal, applications like tracking and monitoring, smart building and infrastructure, and end users such as consumer electronics. The report highlighted significant data concerning market trends, with particular focus on key numbers and statistics.

news.headline: Inventor from San Antonio, Texas develops AITANA SOLAR POWERED SHELF with lights for decorative appearance and safety.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from San Antonio, Texas, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the AITANA SOLAR POWERED SHELF. The inventor aimed to develop a decorative shelf that also incorporates lighting to enhance the ambiance and safety of a room. This innovative design seeks to offer both aesthetic appeal and functionality.

news.headline: Mouser Electronics wins 2023 Electronics Division Distributor Partnership Award from Eaton in Americas.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics, an authorized global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products, has been honored with the 2023 Electronics Division Distributor Partnership Award in the Americas by Eaton. This prestigious award recognizes Mouser Electronics for its strong partnership with Eaton, a top global manufacturer of power management solutions. Mouser's dedication to collaboration with Eaton has earned them this accolade, showcasing their commitment to excellence in the industry. The award underscores Mouser's significant contribution to the Electronics Division and highlights their success in fostering meaningful partnerships in the electronic components sector.

news.headline: TGS announces merger completion with PGS, new executive team, and Capital Markets Day on Aug 29, 2024.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on 1 July 2024, TGS, a prominent energy data and intelligence company with a 43-year legacy, initiated a significant milestone. The company has successfully concluded a merger with PGS, introducing a fresh Executive team and marking August 29, 2024, for a Capital Markets Day. This development solidifies TGS as the leading data and services entity within the energy sector.

news.headline: BlackRock plans to "Index Private Markets" following Preqin acquisition, in a deal valued at multi-million dollars.
Eric Martino appointed as President of Hard Rock Cafe & Retail Division, overseeing operation of company's nearly 200 eateries globally.
news.summary: Hollywood, Florida - On July 1, 2024, Hard Rock International revealed the selection of Eric Martino as the President of the Hard Rock Cafe Division. With extensive experience in the restaurant and hospitality sectors, Martino will supervise the operations of approximately 200 beloved eateries across the globe. This appointment signifies a significant move within the company's leadership team.

news.headline: Government receives bids worth $4.3 billion for 6-month Treasury bills.
Federal Reserve submits bids amounting to $4.5 billion for 3-month bills.
Yields rise again after Morgan Stanley warns of Trump impact,  source says.
Partnership automates diagnostic test reporting for organ donation, saving critical hours for OPOs. - SALT LAKE CITY, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A cutting-edge telepathology interface is set to revolutionize Organ Procurement Organizations (OPOs) by streamlining processes and enhancing patient safety. The new interface, developed by InVita Healthcare Technologies and called DonorConnect, will eliminate current time-consuming manual methods. This advancement, announced in Salt Lake City on July 1, 2024, is projected to save significant hours for OPOs, bolstering efficiency.

news.headline: Dr. Stacey E. Rosen of Northwell Health named President-elect of the American Heart Association for 2024-2025, formally assumes role in July 2025.
news.summary: In New Hyde Park, N.Y., the American Heart Association (AHA) has announced the appointment of Dr. Stacey E. Rosen, MD, from Northwell Health as their 2024-2025 volunteer President-elect. Dr. Rosen, a seasoned cardiologist with over 30 years of experience, currently serves as the senior vice president of women’s health and executive director of the Katz Institute for Women’s Health (KIWH). She is set to assume the role of president in July 2025. The AHA is a prominent nonprofit organization dedicated to heart and brain health worldwide.

news.headline: Bitfarms Ltd shares trading higher after mining 189 Bitcoin in June, up from 156 in May. Production offset by curtailment in Argentina and 0.8% decrease in network difficulty. Installation of 39,000 new miners ongoing.
news.summary: Bitfarms Ltd (NASDAQ:BITF) saw an increase in shares as they provided an update on their production and operations for June. The company reported mining 189 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) last month, up from 156 bitcoin in May due to a rise in corporate hashrate. Despite facing challenges such as curtailment in Argentina and downtime for miner upgrades in Quebec, their total production was partially offset by a 0.8% decrease in network difficulty compared to the previous month. Bitfarms continues to progress on fleet upgrades and constructing new facilities, with over 39,000 new miners installed and deracked.

news.headline: TGS and PGS merger completed after meeting all conditions on 11 June 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Oslo, Norway, TGS ASA (OSE: TGS) and PGS ASA (OSE: PGS) referred to their joint stock exchange announcement from September 18, 2023, about their merger. Subsequent updates were provided on October 25, 2023, and December 1, 2023, regarding the definitive merger agreement execution and approval by extraordinary general meetings. On June 11, 2024, all conditions necessary for the merger completion were confirmed satisfied, marking a significant step in the process.

news.headline: Dow Jones up after economic data, Nvidia target raised, stock drops.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw an increase following the release of significant economic data. Despite a price-target increase, shares of Nvidia experienced a decline. The market saw positive movement with notable figures including a rise in the Dow Jones index and a drop in Nvidia's stock. This information reflects the current state of the stock market and investors' reactions to recent events.
